description_short: Birmingham anchors central Alabama in the heart of Dixie Alley, with one of the highest tornado-fatality histories in the United States.
description_long: Located in central Alabama in the foothills of the Appalachians, Birmingham faces severe tornado risk during the spring and a pronounced winter peak — "Dixie Alley" sees more nocturnal and cold-season tornadoes than the Plains. Jefferson County is served by NWS Birmingham (office code BMX) within forecast zone ALZ024 (Jefferson Central).
